role: This directory provides the canonical protocol type definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system, including interfaces, type aliases, and constants that define the data contracts for configuration, index entries, manifests, rules, language support, and versioning.
responsibility: These type definitions collectively establish a shared, versioned schema layer that governs the structure and interoperability of all ArchSpine components, ensuring consistent data formats for project configuration, file-level metadata, dependency graphs, language detection, manifest tracking, rule documents, and schema versioning across the system.

children.role: Configuration schema definition module for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing the canonical shape for project-, LLM-, and MCP-related settings.

Core protocol type definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system. Provides the canonical interfaces and type aliases that describe index entries, graph edges, skeletons, provenance, folder/project units, and health diagnostics.
Protocol type barrel file aggregating all shared type definitions for the ArchSpine governance layer.
Protocol type definitions for language detection and support snapshots.
Type definitions for the Spine manifest protocol, defining the structure of manifest files and sync state.
Protocol type definition module that declares the canonical interface for rule documents within the ArchSpine system.
Version constant definitions and type guard for ArchSpine protocol schema versions.
